name: Kusano

name: Madoka Kaguya
description: A third year middle school student who does her best to be ladylike. She is from a family with a storied history: her father works in the government and her mother is a world-famous pianist. She herself holds national championship titles in piano and archery. She also does flower arrangement and tea ceremony, and gets excellent grades. As the student council president, she is known as the "moon" of her school.

name: Maria Fiana Albert
nativeName: マリア・フィアナ・アルバート
description: __Race:__ Human Maria is the younger daughter of the Duke from House Albert. Maria is a very dignified person who does not despise the aristocrats below her. In the past, her ancestor defeated a powerful wizard, and due to the curse the wizard bestowed, she was born with the Sixteenth Year Death Curse. A Cursed Skill that causes waves of violent pain attack the body in a set cycle and leads to its user's death on the 16th birthday. Maria was manifesting the symptoms since she was a child.

name: Matsukaze
description: Matsukaze is a warrior from the Petrification Kingdom.
